title: Package
description: Represents an in-flight deployment package associated with an Appian application. Contains metadata about the package contents and status.

name.description: The name of the deployment package.

description.description: A description of the deployment package.
description.example: Updates the executive summary view with new reports.

uuid.description: The unique identifier for the package. This UUID can be used with the Deployment REST API for exports and deployments.

objectCount.description: The number of design objects included in the package.

databaseScriptCount.description: The number of database scripts included in the package.

pluginCount.description: The number of plug-ins included in the package.

datasourceUuid.description: The UUID of the data source associated with the package, if applicable.

hasCustomizationFile.description: Indicates whether the package includes an import customization file.

createdTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the package was created.

lastModifiedTimestamp.description: The timestamp when the package was last modified. Packages are sorted by this field in descending order.

ticketLink.description: A link to an external ticket or change request associated with this package.
